description: Wasm lazy-entry stub control-flow violation - tiering/lazy stubs computed the callee pointer incorrectly for exported wasm calls. The vulnerable logic in js/src/wasm/WasmCode.cpp could branch into the middle of a code segment or helper stub rather than the intended wasm entry point. That misdirected control flow is caught as a wild jump/crash in debug+ASAN builds and represents a control-flow integrity violation in release builds. The fix corrects the lazy entry stub calleePtr calculation.

fixes.description: Bug 1952215 - wasm: Fix calleePtr for lazy stubs. r=rhunt
